name: Bob Lazar
summary: Public figure whose 1989 interviews alleging work at S-4 near Area 51 profoundly shaped modern UFO culture and reverse-engineering narratives.

relationships.context: Central subject of the episode and documentary discussion
Claimed a stable form of Element 115 powered the Sport Model craft
Claimed nine unconventional craft were stored at the alleged S4 facility

profileStatus: Foundational public claimant and disclosure personality
profileSummary: Public figure whose 1989 interviews alleging work at S-4 near Area 51 profoundly shaped modern UFO culture and reverse-engineering narratives.
background: Self-described former physicist and contractor associated with Los Alamos and a claimed facility near Area 51.
inclusionNote: Included because of his foundational influence on Area 51, S-4, Element 115, and reverse-engineering narratives. His educational and employment claims, evidence, and interpretations remain heavily disputed.
